name: Lone Tree Farmers' Market
notes: No working official website or verifiable official Facebook page could be found. On-file website/facebook were both blank to begin with. The market's historic location (8585 S. Yosemite St., Sears Outlet Store parking lot, Lone Tree, CO 80124) is now defunct — the Sears Outlet store itself has closed. Multiple third-party directories (MenuPix, Marketspread) indicate the market is permanently closed or no longer operational, and a referenced organizer domain (laughingdogfarms.net) does not resolve (dead domain). A Facebook page titled 'Lone Tree Farmers Market' exists (facebook.com/pages/Lone-Tree-Farmers-Market/242788199084954) but its content could not be accessed (login-walled) and its currency/official status could not be verified, so no fields were extracted from it. Aggregator sites (Foraged, farmersstand.com, nfmd.org, bestfarmersmarkets.org, Castle Pines Connection article) report Saturdays 9am-1pm, June-September at the Yosemite St address, but per instructions these third-party sources were not used to populate fields since they are not official and the market appears closed. No legitimate official source with clearly stated facts was found.
